title: Xtra Sweet Malaysian Snow Peas Noodles
description: A sweet and shattering Malaysian dish featuring snow peas, perfect for a brunch mood, and is plant-based friendly. This dish is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the snow peas to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and maple syrup.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the snow peas and noodles, and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with sliced green onions if desired.
